title: Noah Lucas homepage v018 static Serve photo on white panel

source.localSource: v017 release corrected per Noah feedback

Keeps the full Serve Robotics media panel background white in day and night modes.
Keeps the external-assets pointer contract; live Squarespace editor is not modified.

checks: Serve Robotics media contains one image and zero video elements
